no_sessions_match: No sessions match the current filters.
setup_welcome_body: A teacher does not write the code.
setup_pillar_observe_desc: Watch how you and your assistants work together.
setup_folders_desc: Add the root paths where your code lives.
placeholder_patterns_desc: Consolidated patterns and anti-patterns across all projects.
placeholder_libraries_desc: Detected libraries, imported SDKs, and external MCP services.
placeholder_instruments_desc: MCP tool playground, session replay, and usage insights.
placeholder_teachings_desc: Learnings, memories, and recommendations across all projects.
placeholder_settings_desc: Theme, density, palette, and language settings will be implemented in Phase 8.
placeholder_project_desc: Project detail view — overview, graph, patterns, sessions, settings.
obs_koan_body: In 3 of the last 5 sessions on lumen-cloud, the assistant hallucinated authentication middleware that doesn't exist. It reaches for Bearer tokens when your stack uses session cookies.
obs_koan_impact: Teaching this pattern could save ~12 corrections per week.
obs_insight_1_body: Seen in 4 repos this week. The assistant writes retry loops without exponential backoff. A teaching could prevent this across all projects.
obs_insight_2_body: The import-ordering rule you taught 3 weeks ago has been applied in 89% of sessions. Zero corrections since adoption.
obs_insight_3_body: Two projects disagree on test placement (__tests__/ vs colocated). Consider a cross-project teaching.
obs_teaching_1: Import ordering: external → internal → relative → types
obs_teaching_2: Always use parameterized queries, never string interpolation
obs_teaching_3: Prefer named exports over default exports
obs_session_1: Add export dialog with format picker
obs_session_3: Generate SVG sprite from icon set
obs_session_4: Refactor canvas zoom to use wheel events
obs_session_5: Add rate limiting to public API endpoints
sess_session_7: Add keyboard shortcuts to tool palette
sess_retro_well_1: FTR streak: lumen-studio at 80% this week (up from 65%)
sess_retro_well_2: brand-kit sessions average 14 minutes — shortest across all projects
sess_retro_well_3: Import ordering teaching: zero corrections in 3 weeks
sess_retro_bad_1: lumen-cloud auth: 3 corrections per session average
sess_retro_bad_2: Abandoned sessions up 15% — mostly long refactors
sess_retro_bad_3: Test file placement inconsistent across 2 projects
sess_retro_insight_1: Rust + auth is your hardest combination (lowest FTR)
sess_retro_insight_2: Morning sessions (before 11am) are 2x more likely first-try-right
sess_retro_insight_3: Sessions over 30 minutes have 60% correction rate
this_step_placeholder: This step will be implemented in a future iteration.
